rationale: The two papers are closely aligned in topic and mechanism: the citing paper studies the signal value of a crowdfunded label on consumer demand, and the cited paper shows that labeling products as customer-ideated increases sales via quality inferences. Given this strong conceptual overlap (label/source cue at purchase and quality-inference pathway) and a confirmed DOI match in the reference list (10.1509/jmr.15.0244), this citation is plausibly foundational/comparative rather than incidental.
